name: The Ass Room {Remastered}
description:
Attempt to escape the impossible escape room or enjoy the failure of smelling like ass sweat.

Note: There are two modes; Regular and Extreme.

Regular: Regular mode will just be the giantess smushing the user with her ass and sweat musking the room.

Extreme: Extreme mode is very similar to regular, but not only would the giantess press harder, the giantess would also fart to make it harder on the user.

Artist: Tail-Blazer
creator: TheTinyAdventuner
